title: Fiery Roasted Ukrainian Morcilla Paella
description: A roasted Ukrainian dish featuring morcilla, made in a paella pan and suitable for a post-workout meal, this recipe combines flavors and heat to create a unique culinary experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the morcilla into 1-inch thick rounds and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in the paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the morcilla and cook until browned on both sides, about 2 minutes per side.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and cayenne pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the brown rice, chicken broth, and diced tomatoes, and stir to combine.
Transfer the paella pan to the preheated oven and roast for 25 minutes.
Remove the paella pan from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
